risk_title: Unresolved Grievances Indicating Service Delivery Tensions
risk_summary: One grievance remains unresolved in Dire Dawa utility despite project efforts, suggesting underlying tensions between government/utility actors and beneficiaries that could escalate if not addressed.
evidence_quote: A total of 33 grievances have been recorded in AA (22) and DD (11). All 22 cases in AA have been resolved while 10 out of the 11 have been resolved in DD. The MoWE and the DD utility are working to fully address the issue related to the pending grievance request.
